series_metadata.series_description: File includes support documentation for on/line and instant game adjustments for credit and or debits, processed via lottery contracted vendors systems. Adjustments pertain to ticket redemptions, returned tickets, stolen tickets, agent request for adjustment, agent reimbursements (cash advances).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: digital copy in system two (2) years (when report/information is submitted digitally) audit report is received
